tickets.summary: User Signup with Email and Password
tickets.description: As a new user, I want to create an account using email and password so that I can access the platform.
acceptance_criteria: User can enter email and password
Email validation is performed
Password meets security requirements (min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number)
Confirmation email is sent
Account is created upon email verification
Error messages are clear for invalid inputs

tickets.description: As a user, I want to sign up using OAuth providers (Google or GitHub) so that I don't need to remember another password.
acceptance_criteria: User can select Google or GitHub login
OAuth flow redirects correctly
User profile data is populated from OAuth provider
Account is created automatically after OAuth authorization
Email is verified automatically from OAuth provider

tickets.description: As a user, I want to complete my profile information after signing up so that the platform has enough data to personalize my experience.
acceptance_criteria: User is prompted to enter first name, last name, and phone
All fields have proper validation
User can skip optional fields
Profile can be updated later
Success message appears upon completion

tickets.description: As the system, I want to verify user email addresses during signup so that we ensure legitimate user registrations.
acceptance_criteria: Verification email is sent within 1 minute of signup
Email contains verification link with expiry (24 hours)
Clicking link verifies account and redirects to dashboard
Expired links show error message
Resend verification option is available
Verified users get confirmation notification

tickets.summary: Duplicate Account Prevention and Error Handling
tickets.description: As the system, I want to prevent duplicate accounts and handle signup errors gracefully so that user experience is smooth and data integrity is maintained.
acceptance_criteria: System rejects signup if email already exists
Clear error message indicates email is registered
Suggestion to login or reset password is shown
Network errors are handled with retry option
Rate limiting prevents brute force attempts
All errors are logged for monitoring
